passives.name: Support Quest
passives.effects: Earn {{g|800}} through ''Shared Riches'' and this item's {{stil|gold generation}} stat to automatically upgrade to {{ii|Bounty of Worlds}}, increasing the ''Ward'' active to instead have 4 wards in stock.

passives.name: Shared Riches
passives.effects:
Grants a '''Shared Riches''' charge every 20 seconds, up to 3 charges. When an allied champion is within {{tip|er|icononly=true}} 1050 units of you, consume a charge in the following ways:
• Kill a minion by any means, granting you {{g|20}} and the nearest allied champion kill {{g|gold}}. Damaging a minion {{as|'''below''' {{rd|50%|30%}} of its '''maximum''' health}} with a [[basic attack]] will {{tip|execute}} it, if any charges are available.
• Damage an enemy champion or structure with a basic attack or ability, granting you {{g|{{rd|24|22}}}}. A charge may be consumed this way only once per attack or ability.
Receives diminishing gold from excessive minion kills.

active.name: Ward
active.effects: Consumes a charge to place a {{tip|Stealth Ward}} at the target location, which grants {{tip|sight}} of the surrounding area. '''Warding''' charges refill upon visiting the shop.

effects_structured.raw: Earn 800 gold via Shared Riches and gold generation to upgrade to Bounty of Worlds; Ward stock becomes 4.
Gain a Shared Riches charge every 20 seconds, up to 3.
If an allied champion is within 1050 units, Shared Riches charges can be consumed by minion kills or champion/structure damage.
Minion kill consumes a charge, granting you 20 gold and the nearest ally the minion gold.
Basic attack executes minions below 50% (melee) or 30% (ranged) max health if a charge is available.
Damaging an enemy champion or structure grants 24 gold (22 for ranged).
Shared Riches charge consumption occurs once per attack or ability.
Receives diminishing gold from excessive minion kills.

modifiers.post_5_minutes_gold_reduction_formula_no: 50% + 1% per minion kill starting from 20 kills, capped at 50 kills

effects_structured.raw: Consume a ward charge to place a Stealth Ward at target location (600 range), granting vision. Charges refill at shop.
Warding charges refill upon visiting the shop.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Runic Compass is modeled as the second support-quest tier: Shared Riches charge economy plus quest progression into Bounty of Worlds with expanded ward stock.

Support-income diminishing minion-gold behavior encodes page-verified pre/post-5-minute threshold formulas and reduction ranges, while exact per-minute windowing and team support-item dynamics remain shared-rule dependencies.
Execution-semantics review confirms Shared Riches is target/range gated: charge spend only occurs with an ally nearby and resolves on minion-kill execute or champion/structure damage events.
Sell-state policy resolved for support-quest staging: represent page-verified No Sell behavior with shop.prices.sell = 0 for quest-stage items.
Tier-1 dataset discrepancy is intentionally tracked: Data Dragon and CommunityDragon still list sell=160 for this item while page-level gameplay behavior shows No Sell.
Quality normalization (2026-02-24): missing parse_confidence metadata on ward utility branches was backfilled after manual review.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset

sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
